ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price_k" REAL /* Sale price in thousands */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (cash, mortgage, etc.) */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "sale_terms" TEXT /* Additional terms or conditions of the sale */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the sales data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. real estate agent, investor, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File containing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_data" TEXT /* Data related to the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
column_names: ID of the property being sold
Additional terms or conditions of the sale
Timestamp when the sales data was created
Timestamp when the sales data was last updated
Role of the user (e.g. real estate agent, investor, researcher)
Password of the user (hashed for security)
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp when the user account was last updated
